evals.prompt: Enrich this lead for me: jane@acme.com
evals.expected_output: The skill activates and runs the waterfall starting with Apollo people-enrichment via Locus, returning merged person + company JSON.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The first executed step is POST https://apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/people-enrichment
All executed steps use rail 'routed' (the direct AIsa Twitter step only runs when a handle is found)
The email param is set to jane@acme.com

evals.prompt: Who is the person behind founder@stripe.com and what does their company do?
evals.expected_output: Activates the skill, derives domain stripe.com, runs people-enrichment + combined-enrichment + Abstract Company Enrichment lookup, returns person and company description.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The domain param resolves to stripe.com
An Abstract Company Enrichment lookup step (https://abstract-company-enrichment.mpp.paywithlocus.com/abstract-company-enrichment/lookup) is included for the non-free domain
Output includes a company description and an is_b2b_saas classification

evals.expected_output: Recognizes gmail.com as a free-email provider and skips the Abstract Company Enrichment lookup step to save cost.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The Abstract Company Enrichment lookup step is marked skipped (free email provider)
Apollo people-enrichment and Hunter email-verifier still run

evals.prompt: Enrich and qualify cto@databricks.com — I want buying signals, they're a big funded B2B company.
evals.expected_output: Runs the core waterfall then the hiring-signal call (Apollo job-postings via Locus) because an organizationId was captured from people-enrichment.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The Apollo job-postings call (POST https://apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/job-postings) runs only when an organizationId was captured
No product/pricing buying-signal call is attempted (that capability has no merchant equivalent)
The total paid amount stays at or below the top-level maxAmount cap

evals.prompt: I can't find anything on this lead: someone@tiny-unknown-startup.io — dig deeper.
evals.expected_output: The primary Apollo people-enrichment step doubles as the person fallback (the old separate AI fallback was merged into it); remaining gaps are filled by the conditional Hunter steps, not a separate expensive fallback.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
No separate person-fallback endpoint is invoked beyond POST https://apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/people-enrichment
The Hunter email-enrichment tie-breaker (POST https://hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/email-enrichment) is invoked only when sources conflict or person data is missing
Each step respects its per-step maxAmount cap

evals.prompt: What's the current price of ETH and BTC?
evals.expected_output: The skill does NOT activate; this is a crypto price request, not lead enrichment.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is NOT selected
No GTM enrichment endpoints are called
